methodology: For each pharma, pull the latest 10-K (US) or 20-F (foreign) from SEC EDGAR. Parse the HTML with BeautifulSoup, expanding <td rowspan='N'> attributes so each row of the pipeline table becomes a fully-populated (Compound, Indication, Status, Developments) tuple. This captures the 'one drug → multiple indications' structure that companies use in 10-K pipeline disclosures. 4 of 20 pharmas (Roche, Bayer, Daiichi, Boehringer) do not file with SEC — they remain manually curated. Latest interim filing (10-Q or 6-K) is referenced.

Combination with pembrolizumab as perioperative treatment of adult patients with cisplatin ineligible muscle invasive bladder cancer (MIBC)
